initial_program:
% Dimensions of the input grid
n_rows(N) :- N = #max{R : input(R,_,_)} + 1.
n_cols(M) :- M = #max{C : input(_,C,_)} + 1.

% Output cell predicate  each input cell must have a colour in the output
output_cell(R, C) :- input(R, C, _).

% Exactly one colour for each output cell
1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(C) } 1 :- output_cell(R, C).

% Special colour 1 must stay 1
:- input(R, C, 1), output(R, C, Color), Color != 1.

% Floodfill: cells reachable from the border through cells that are not colour1
outside(R, C) :- input(R, C, V), V != 1, R = 0.
outside(R, C) :- input(R, C, V), V != 1, R = N-1.
outside(R, C) :- input(R, C, V), V != 1, C = 0.
outside(R, C) :- input(R, C, V), V != 1, C = M-1.

outside(R2, C2) :- outside(R1, C1), delta(DR, DC),
                  R2 = R1 + DR, C2 = C1 + DC,
                  input(R2, C2, V), V != 1.

% Adjacent moves (4connected)
delta(0, 1). delta(0, -1). delta(1, 0). delta(-1, 0).

% Zero cells that are reachable from the border become 0
:- input(R, C, 0), outside(R, C), output(R, C, Color), Color != 0.

% Zero cells that are interior (not reachable) become colour4
:- input(R, C, 0), not outside(R, C), output(R, C, Color), Color != 4.

% Cells with any other colour must keep that colour
:- input(R, C, V), V != 0, V != 1, output(R, C, Color), Color != V.

% Exactly one answer set
:- true.

% Dimensions of the input grid
max_rows(X) :- X = #max{R : input(R,_,_)}.
n_rows(N) :- max_rows(X), N = X + 1.

% Output cell predicate  each input cell must have a colour in the output
output_cell(R, C) :- input(R, C, _).

% Exactly one colour for each output cell
1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(C) } 1 :- output_cell(R, C).

% Special colour 1 must stay 1
:- input(R, C, 1), output(R, C, Color), Color != 1.

% Floodfill: cells reachable from the border through cells that are not colour1
outside(R, C) :- input(R, C, V), V != 1, R = 0.
outside(R, C) :- input(R, C, V), V != 1, R = N-1.
outside(R, C) :- input(R, C, V), V != 1, C = 0.
outside(R, C) :- input(R, C, V), V != 1, C = M-1.

outside(R2, C2) :- outside(R1, C1), delta(DR, DC),
                  R2 = R1 + DR, C2 = C1 + DC,
                  input(R2, C2, V), V != 1.

% Adjacent moves (4connected)
delta(0, 1). delta(0, -1). delta(1, 0). delta(-1, 0).

% Zero cells that are reachable from the border become 0
:- input(R, C, 0), outside(R, C), output(R, C, Color), Color != 0.

% Zero cells that are interior (not reachable) become colour4
:- input(R, C, 0), not outside(R, C), output(R, C, Color), Color != 4.

% Cells with any other colour must keep that colour
:- input(R, C, V), V != 0, V != 1, output(R, C, Color), Color != V.

% Exactly one answer set
:- true.

% Dimensions of the input grid
max_rows(X) :- X = #max{R : input(R,_,_)}.
n_rows(N) :- max_rows(X), N = X + 1.

% Output cell predicate  each input cell must have a colour in the output
output_cell(R, C) :- input(R, C, _).

% Exactly one colour for each output cell
output(R, C, Color) :- output_cell(R, C), true.

% Special colour 1 must stay 1
:- input(R, C, 1), output(R, C, Color), Color != 1.

% Floodfill: cells reachable from the border through cells that are not colour1
outside(R, C) :- input(R, C, V), V != 1, R = 0.
outside(R, C) :- input(R, C, V), V != 1, R = N-1.
outside(R, C) :- input(R, C, V), V != 1, C = 0.
outside(R, C) :- input(R, C, V), V != 1, C = M-1.

outside(R2, C2) :- outside(R1, C1), delta(DR, DC),
                  R2 = R1 + DR, C2 = C1 + DC,
                  input(R2, C2, V), V != 1.

% Adjacent moves (4connected)
delta(0, 1). delta(0, -1). delta(1, 0). delta(-1, 0).

% Zero cells that are reachable from the border become 0
:- input(R, C, 0), outside(R, C), output(R, C, Color), Color != 0.

% Zero cells that are interior (not reachable) become colour4
:- input(R, C, 0), not outside(R, C), output(R, C, Color), Color != 4.

% Cells with any other colour must keep that colour
:- input(R, C, V), V != 0, V != 1, output(R, C, Color), Color != V.

% Exactly one answer set
:- true.
